notice: Non-production Gate 0 examples. Names, IDs, rarity, and release status are not approved for runtime use.

characters.behavior: Secures its hindquarters, leans forward, and offers one found object before retreating.
characters.visualHook: A small voluntary offering made from a strongly anchored body.
characters.silhouetteHook: One joined forepaw block projects from a broad, low hind-body block.
characters.bodyArchitecture: compact body with small forelimbs and a heavy hind anchor
characters.faceLanguage: Short muzzle under one brow-to-cheek plane; eye size is secondary.
characters.colorLanguage: One warm face/forepaw bridge across a darker main mass.

toyeticStructure.description: head, trunk/hind mass, joined forepaw block, two foot blocks

characters.behavior: Touches the ground ahead with its trunk before moving its whole weight in one direction.
characters.visualHook: Large strength expressed as careful pathfinding.
characters.silhouetteHook: A low forward trunk bridge points into a high compact head-and-shoulder mass.
characters.bodyArchitecture: massive quadruped with trunk bridge and four column supports
characters.faceLanguage: Forehead, trunk root, and cheek form one elephant-specific construction.
characters.colorLanguage: One light trunk-to-forehead route over a deep main mass.

toyeticStructure.description: head/shoulder mass, body mass, trunk, two front supports, two rear supports

characters.behavior: Keeps most weight in a low coil while one short section turns toward a ground vibration.
characters.visualHook: Stillness reads as attention rather than threat.
characters.silhouetteHook: A sheltered open space sits between an asymmetric low coil and a short upright neck.
characters.bodyArchitecture: limbless asymmetric coil with short upright neck and head wedge
characters.faceLanguage: Wedge-to-neck transition and jaw line carry identity without mammal facial shorthand.
characters.colorLanguage: One uninterrupted light route from lower coil to jaw against a dark main body.

toyeticStructure.description: lower coil, counter-coil, neck, head wedge

gate0Briefs.characterCore: A small finder who must gather courage before sharing the thing it values.
gate0Briefs.reasonToLike: Its brave act is tiny but voluntary.
gate0Briefs.silhouetteMemoryPoint: forward joined forepaw block against a low hind anchor
gate0Briefs.faceMemoryPoint: short muzzle beneath one brow-to-cheek plane

gate0Briefs.characterCore: A large guide who listens to the path before taking one certain step.
gate0Briefs.reasonToLike: Strength is expressed as care and certainty rather than dominance.
gate0Briefs.silhouetteMemoryPoint: low trunk bridge into a high compact shoulder mass

gate0Briefs.characterCore: A quiet listener who makes a safe place by feeling what others miss.
gate0Briefs.reasonToLike: Stillness reads as attention, not threat.
gate0Briefs.silhouetteMemoryPoint: sheltered negative space between low coil and short neck
